description: Full org management — users, contacts, addresses, orders, purchasing
permissions: org:manage, org:members:manage, org:orders:view, org:orders:create, catalog:view, cart:manage, checkout:place_order, addresses:manage, quotes:manage

description: Can browse catalog, manage cart, place orders, view own orders
permissions: catalog:view, cart:manage, checkout:place_order, org:orders:view_own, addresses:view, quotes:request
test_purpose: Buyer role — purchasing without org management

description: Read-only access — browse catalog and view prices only
test_purpose: Viewer role — no purchasing (RBAC negative test)

description: View all orders, manage payment methods, no product purchasing
test_purpose: Finance role — order visibility without purchasing

description: Minimal custom role — only catalog browse, no cart access
test_purpose: Minimal role — RBAC boundary test (cannot add to cart)
